package.name: nav2_visibility_graph_planner
package.description: Visibility-graph global planner for Nav2 (nav2_core::GlobalPlanner). Reasons about obstacle geometry rather than grid cells: graph vertices are obstacle convex corners (plus start and goal), edges connect mutually visible vertices, and an A* search returns a piecewise-straight corner-hugging route. Upstream Nav2 has no visibility-graph planner. Part of nav2_experimental_planner: planners not in upstream Nav2.
